SHIFT_ALREADY_ACTIVE: You already have an active shift that has not been ended.
SHIFT_GPS_OUT_OF_BOUNDS: Your location is outside the work area boundary.

SHIFT_PHOTO_UPLOAD_FAILED: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
SHIFT_DURATION_TOO_SHORT: Shift duration is too short to be ended.
ACTIVITY_SHIFT_NOT_FOUND: The shift for this activity was not found.
ACTIVITY_EDIT_WINDOW_CLOSED: The window to edit this activity has closed.
ACTIVITY_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have access to this activity.
ACTIVITY_PHOTO_UPLOAD_FAILED: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
ACTIVITY_ROLE_MISMATCH: The activity type does not match your role.
ACTIVITY_MAX_PHOTOS: The number of photos exceeds the maximum limit.
ACTIVITY_MIN_PHOTOS: The number of photos is below the minimum required.
OVERTIME_SUBMIT_AUTH: You are not authorized to submit this overtime.
OVERTIME_ALREADY_PROCESSED: This overtime request has already been processed.
OVERTIME_AREA_SCOPE: Overtime is outside your area scope.
TASK_HIER_ROLE: Your role is not authorized for this task.
TASK_HIER_RAYON_SCOPE: The task is outside your district scope.
TASK_HIER_AREA_SCOPE: The task is outside your area scope.
MONITOR_RAYON_SCOPE: The data is outside your district scope.
MONITOR_AREA_SCOPE: The data is outside your area scope.
SYNC_CONFLICT: A data conflict occurred. Reload and try again.
SYNC_STALE_DATA: The data has changed. Please reload the page.
AREA_CODE_DUPLICATE: The area code is already in use.
RAYON_DEACTIVATE_IN_USE: This district still has active regions, locations or staff. Deactivate or re-parent them first.
REGION_DEACTIVATE_IN_USE: This region still has active locations. Deactivate or re-parent them first.
CAPACITY_WRONG_LEVEL: Capacity can only be set at the tier the district nominates (district / region / location). Change the district's staffing level to set it elsewhere.
ASSIGNMENT_NOT_FOUND: You are not assigned to any area.
ASSIGNMENT_ALREADY_EXISTS: You are already assigned to this area.
VALIDATION_ERROR: The submitted data is invalid. Please check your entries.
FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission for this action.
BAD_REQUEST: Invalid request. Please check your entries.
INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
NETWORK_ERROR: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
TIMEOUT_ERROR: The request timed out. Please try again.
UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
